audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:worden + adjective]] and [[grammar:steeds + comparative]]. Use [[grammar:worden]] plus an adjective for become. Use [[grammar:steeds]] plus a comparative for more and more.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:worden + adjective]]: Copular [[grammar:worden]] profiles entry into the state denoted by the adjective.; [[grammar:steeds + comparative]]: [[grammar:Steeds]] iteratively raises the comparison value across successive reference points.

audienceSections.normal:
#### worden + adjective

Use [[grammar:worden]] plus an adjective for become. Example: [[grammar:Tijdens de verbouwing wordt het café moderner.]]

#### steeds + comparative

Use [[grammar:steeds]] plus a comparative for more and more. Example: [[grammar:Na de opening wordt de zaal steeds drukker.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### worden + adjective

Copular [[grammar:worden]] profiles entry into the state denoted by the adjective. Literal example: [[grammar:Tijdens de verbouwing wordt het café moderner.]]

#### steeds + comparative

[[grammar:Steeds]] iteratively raises the comparison value across successive reference points. Literal example: [[grammar:Na de opening wordt de zaal steeds drukker.]]

audienceSections.normal: [[grammar:Worden]] plus an adjective describes entry into a state. [[grammar:Steeds]] plus a comparative expresses gradual change.
audienceSections.expert: [[grammar:Worden]] plus an adjective describes entry into a state. [[grammar:Steeds]] plus a comparative expresses gradual change.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Tijdens de verbouwing wordt het café moderner.]] — During the renovation the café becomes more modern.
- [[grammar:Milan vernieuwt de inrichting en kiest nieuwe verlichting.]] — Milan updates the interior and chooses new lighting.
- [[grammar:De menukaart wordt langer, omdat Yasmin nieuwe gerechten toevoegt.]] — The menu becomes longer because Yasmin adds new dishes.
- [[grammar:Fatima ziet dat de keuken steeds ruimer wordt.]] — Fatima sees that the kitchen is becoming more and more spacious.
- [[grammar:Na de opening wordt de zaal steeds drukker.]] — After the opening the hall becomes busier and busier.
- [[grammar:Toch wordt de werkplek achter de toonbank rustiger.]] — Still, the workplace behind the counter becomes calmer.
- [[grammar:Yasmin breidt de lunch uit met verse soep.]] — Yasmin expands the lunch offering with fresh soup.
- [[grammar:De nieuwe menukaart wordt populair bij studenten.]] — The new menu becomes popular with students.
- [[grammar:In een maand bezoeken achtduizend klanten het café.]] — Eight thousand customers visit the café in one month.
- [[grammar:De rij bij de ingang wordt daarom langer.]] — The line at the entrance therefore becomes longer.
- [[grammar:Milan maakt de looproute steeds duidelijker.]] — Milan makes the walking route clearer and clearer.
- [[grammar:Milan vernieuwt de borden boven de kassa.]] — Milan renews the signs above the register.
- [[grammar:De verbouwing heeft het café groter en lichter gemaakt.]] — The renovation has made the café larger and brighter.
- [[grammar:De inrichting wordt steeds praktischer.]] — The interior becomes more and more practical.
- [[grammar:Yasmin wordt zekerder in haar nieuwe rol.]] — Yasmin becomes more confident in her new role.
- [[grammar:Het café blijft veranderen, maar de sfeer blijft gezellig.]] — The café keeps changing, but the atmosphere remains pleasant.
breakdown.expert:
- [[grammar:Tijdens de verbouwing wordt het café moderner.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 1 > sentence 1.

- [[grammar:Toch wordt de werkplek achter de toonbank rustiger.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > paragraph 2 > sentence 2.
